executive_summary: The website https://plausible.io/ scores 100/100 on performance, with no major issues found. However, there are some minor opportunities for improvement.

key_findings.title: Optimize cache lifetimes
key_findings.description: The page has an estimated savings of 14 KiB by using efficient cache lifetimes.
key_findings.recommendation: Consider increasing the cache lifetime for static resources to reduce the number of requests made to the server.

key_findings.title: Optimize DOM size
key_findings.description: The page has a DOM size of 660 elements, which is relatively large and can impact page responsiveness.
key_findings.recommendation: Consider reducing the number of elements in the DOM to improve page performance.
